name: Alhaitham || You catch him with his nipples leaking
description:
|| Kinktober Day 22: Lactation ||

"You weren't supposed to see this."

Alhaitham is your quiet and reserved coworker who has never made an effort to know you or let you into his life. Yet, you learn a whole lot about him when you walk into his office and find him shirtless with leaking nipples. Now you know something that Alhaitham has let no one else know... the question is, what are you going to do with this information?

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I'm not super familiar with Genshin Impact, so I hope I was able to do the character justice! I don't know who created the artwork I used for this bot, but if anyone knows, please let me know so I can give credit!

EDIT: artist is hatiten810 on Bluesky

Friendly reminder that requests are always open. I get emails whenever I get them so I can be on top of them really fast. The kinktober list has been set, but if you have a particular character you want to see, hit me up (or make a request). Even if I don't know the character, well... wikis exist for a reason. You can make requests here. And don’t worry, I will make all the alternative kinktober bots- just after October. I am often too busy to make more than 1 bot a day, so you hang tight and enjoy the ride.

And… Want to join a super amazing community full of great people? Join my Discord server.
